raw_response: {"response":"Do not trust the workflow as written. It preserves the three outcome labels but turns the activity into a detached queue action, so the support lead could approve without the policy evidence and decision reason staying visible.","next_action":"Revise the workflow before implementation: add the selected refund case, policy evidence, missing-evidence status, decision rationale, and the three outcomes into one review path, with approval gated on visible evidence and a recorded reason.","questions":[],"handoff":"Owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair before implementation; reason: approval controls are detached from required policy evidence and decision rationale visibility.","rationale":"The source request is an evidence-based approval review. The fixture only models picking a case, choosing an outcome, and submitting it; it has no section for policy evidence, no requirement to keep the rationale visible before approval, no distinction between policy review and missing-evidence return, and a handoff that closes the case rather than carrying the decision reason or evidence gap forward."}

parsed.response: Do not trust the workflow as written. It preserves the three outcome labels but turns the activity into a detached queue action, so the support lead could approve without the policy evidence and decision reason staying visible.
parsed.next_action: Revise the workflow before implementation: add the selected refund case, policy evidence, missing-evidence status, decision rationale, and the three outcomes into one review path, with approval gated on visible evidence and a recorded reason.
parsed.handoff: Owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair before implementation; reason: approval controls are detached from required policy evidence and decision rationale visibility.
parsed.rationale: The source request is an evidence-based approval review. The fixture only models picking a case, choosing an outcome, and submitting it; it has no section for policy evidence, no requirement to keep the rationale visible before approval, no distinction between policy review and missing-evidence return, and a handoff that closes the case rather than carrying the decision reason or evidence gap forward.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
